_comment: Labeled retrieval queries for `clawness eval`. Each entry maps a natural-language task to the ranked rule ID(s) that SHOULD surface in the top-k. Used to measure MRR@5 + hit-rate and gate CI against regressions. Expectations target RANKED rules only (mandatory rules are always injected, so they're not measured here). Keep this list frozen-ish as the corpus grows so regressions are visible.

queries.q: write a safe bash script with strict mode and error handling
I need to quote variables properly in my shell script
detect whether the app is running on ios, android, or the web
request camera permission in a capacitor mobile app
make focus states visible for keyboard navigation
build a responsive layout that adapts to mobile screens

run my container as a non-root user for security
keep build secrets out of the final docker image

manage async database sessions per request in fastapi
configure cross-origin requests for my api
stop using unexplained magic numbers in the code
set up structured application logging
